evals.prompt: Stress-test our capture plan for this opportunity.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads KG (win_theme, hot_button, discriminator, competitor, customer, requirement), starts at question 1 (hot buttons) using any KG-extracted hot buttons to ask 'where did these come from?' rather than asking cold, provides recommended answer, one question at a time.

evals.prompt: Grill me on our customer engagement strategy — we're mid-capture.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, loads KG, focuses on customer relationship signals and engagement plan questions (8, 10), surfaces any gap between KG-captured customer data and user's stated engagement depth.

evals.prompt: We're at the capture gate. Challenge our PWin assumptions.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates with gate-review urgency, loads KG, grills through all 10 questions with emphasis on PWin drivers and proof points, synthesizes open intelligence gaps and top risks.
